data.body:
Classification: behavioral (platform isolation behavior). Score: severity=1, complexity=2, environment=0, flaky=1 (suspected non-determinism — evidence shows isolation sometimes works, sometimes not) = 4 → INTERMEDIATE tier.

Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.

Investigation scope: (a) empirically reproduce isolation:worktree behavior in this session, (b) determine whether the platform enforces isolation consistently, (c) identify what conditions cause agents to write to orchestrator CWD instead of the isolated worktree. Investigation feeds epic c737-977d approach selection.
